title: ribes alpinum subsp. lucidum
intro: Ribes alpinum subsp. lucidum, also known as Lucid Alpine Currant, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the family Grossulariaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. Lucid Alpine Currant can be prepared in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
